reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of fluency bias and shallow understanding, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links early linguistic filtering, thought experiments, and cliché-normalization as a shared failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing filtered and unfiltered systems on preserving strange-but-illuminating explanations and measuring explanatory success.
explanation: Readable filters can suppress strange but valuable explanations, yielding fluent cliché instead of genuine explanatory reach.
